titleStmt.title: SII 28.139: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 139. (A.R. No. 294 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall. ••• ••• ••• ••• •••

Registers the uḷvari (the authenticated order based on a royal order ?) issued by the mūla-parushaiyār of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr ordered to be inscribed in the tirumāḷigai, declaring a total of 4 vēli, 8 mā and mundirikai of land in several plots at several places purchased by proxy (anniyanāmattāl) and granted as the capital for the maintenance (jīvanam) of the servants (tiruttoṇḍargaḷ) tending the garden named tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ set up in Mīdiṉikkuḍi, a hamlet (piḍākai) of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr for the supply of flowers to the God (Mudaliyār) and Goddess (Nāchchiyār), by Maṇa-pāṅkiḻāṉ Aḻagiya-Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ Kāṅgēyarāyaṉ granted by him and entered in the records as that held in the name of God (tirunāmattukkāṇi) and get tax free under arrangement with the ūr (ūr-kīḻ-iṟaiyili). It was arranged to have a car festival probably from the produce from the land found to be in the excess of the land that was alloted probably by a different calculation (maḍakku viḻukkāṭṭupaḍi). Though exempted from all vaṟgam, the land concerned had to pay 100 kāśu as kōyiṟ-kuḍimai (The kuḍimai dues to which the temple was entitled) as also 6 kalam of paddy per vēli as vīra-bhōgam (entitlement of troops guarding the temple ?)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . mutaliyārkkum nācciyārkkum tiruppaḷḷittāmam cātti Aruḷa maṇalpāṅkiḻāṉ Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ kāṅkeyarāyaṉ perumpaṟṟappuliyūr piṭākai mitiṉikkuṭiyil tiruppaḷḷittāmat tirunantavaṉamākac ceyvitta Aḻa
kiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Eṉṉum perāl ceyvitta tirunantavaṉattut tiruttoṇṭarkaḷukku jīvaṉattukku Uṭalāka Ivvūrppiṭākaikaḷil Anniyanāmattāl vilaikoṇṭu Uṭaiya nilamāyp perumpaṟṟappuliyūr mulaparuṣai
yār Eḻutiṉa niyokappaṭiye tirumāḷikaiyil kalveṭṭa Eḻutiṉa Uḷvari mitiṉikkuṭiyil tirucciṟṟampala viḷākam Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilam Eḻumāvum koyil pūṇṭiyil ceṉṉeṟ ceyyeṉṟu peruṭaiya nilam Āṟu māvum Eruk
kāṭṭāñceriyil nattamuṭaiyāṉ Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilam mukkā(l)lum Āka nilam Oṉṟe Eṭṭumā Iḷanāṅkūril mitiṉikkuṭikkavuciyaṉ tiruvaṉanttīśvaramuṭaiyāṉ civaṉperāl vilaikoṇṭu viṭṭa pañcavaṉ mātevivatikku
meṟkku coḷentiraciṅka vāykkāllukku teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñcatirattu kaṇṇiṟainta viḷākameṉṟu peruṭaiya taṭi Oṉṟiṉāl Ūrpaṭinilam Āṟu māvum Itaṉ vaṭakku kaṇapati vāykkālukku teṟkku
Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattu kaṇṇiṟainta viḷākam Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilam mummāvum Iṅku viṭṭukkuṭikku Iraṇṭāñ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattum muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattum Atti Aṭi tiruc
ciṟṟampala viḷākam Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilam Aṟu māvum Itaṉ vaṭakku kāmukaṭi Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilam nāṉ māvaraiyum kunaṭuvatikku meṟkku coḷentira ciṅkavāykkālukkut teṟku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattu ciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ civakāma
cuntari viḷākameṉṟu peruṭaiya nilam Eḻumāvum Iraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattum nālāñ catirattum ciṟṟilamuṭaiyāṉ Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilam māṟumāvum muṉṟā(ṉṟā)ñ catirattum nālāñcatirattum paṉaṅkuḷam taṭi Oṉṟiṉāl nilam Eḻu māvum Itaṉkiḻ
kku nila muṉṟu māvil nilaṅkalantavāṟṟilp paḷḷa nilam Oru māvum Itaṉ vaṭakku pattuc cey Eṉṟu peruṭaiya taṭi Oṉṟiṉāl nilam Āṟu māvum kaṇapati vāykkālukkut teṟku Āṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattu coḷentiraciṅka vāykkālukku teṟku
mutalkkaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñcatirattu nattam Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilam Eḻumāmukkāṇiyum Iṅke mutaActually ka is written probably the scribe had to cut a wordṟkaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñcatirattu nattam nilam kāṇi muntirikaiyum Āka Inta Uṭpaṭṭa nilam muṉṟe Araimā muntirikaiyum Āka nilam nāle Eṇmāvarai muntirikai
yum tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka Ūrkiḻ Iṟaiyili Āka viṭṭom Iṉṉilam AṉaittumṟakamumProbably aṉaittu āyavaṟkaṅkaḷum was intended here.tavirntu Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyilukku maṭakku viḻukkāṭṭuppaṭiyile tirutter Eḻuntaruḷuvikkavum koyiṟ kuṭimaikku veli Oṉṟukku nālu
kācu Iṟukkavum virapokattukkuk kalveṭṭuppaṭiyile veli Oṉṟukku Aṟukala(m)māka vanta nellu Iṟukkavum maṟṟu Aṉaittuvaṟkamum tantarātittavaraiyumRead cantirātittavaraiyumtavirvatāka kalveṭṭuvippatākaRead kalveṭṭuvippatākapaṇṇuvate Ivai maturāntaka bra
hmārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Arumoḻi brahmārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vikkirama coḻabrahmārāyaṉ Eḻuttu koyil kaṇakku tirucciṟṟampalaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu [§]
Digital edition of SII 28.139 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
